NLP · Machine Learning · Knowledge Graphs

Cedric Möller

Building and researching ML systems for information extraction.
House of Computing and Data Science, Hamburg.

Email LinkedIn GitHub DBLP

I design, build, and evaluate ML systems at the intersection of NLP and knowledge graphs — from production pipelines and deployed APIs to peer-reviewed research. I have led multi-partner R&D projects, published in top semantic web venues, and shipped systems used in operational environments.

Technical Skills

Languages
Python C++ Java
ML / DL
PyTorch LLM Fine-tuning Agentic AI RAG
Frameworks
Transformers LangGraph vLLM Elasticsearch FAISS
Systems
Docker FastAPI CI/CD GPU Clusters

Experience

Aug 2024 – Present
Research Associate House of Computing and Data Science, Hamburg
  • Leading a team in a multi-partner R&D project focused on AI support for emergency response
  • Architecting scalable NLP and information extraction pipelines for operational text data
  • Translating stakeholder requirements into deployable technical solutions
Earlier positions
Aug 2021 – Jul 2024
Research Associate University of Hamburg
  • Conducted applied research at the intersection of NLP, semantic web technologies, and knowledge graphs
  • Contributed to project acquisition, technical planning, teaching and supervision of junior researchers
Dec 2019 – Jul 2021
Research Associate Fraunhofer IAIS, Dresden
  • Engineered and integrated a task-oriented dialogue system into an operational software environment
  • Developed information extraction pipelines to structure and normalize information from heterogeneous text sources
Oct 2017 – Mar 2018
Intern Fraunhofer IPA, Stuttgart
  • Contributed to the development of a long-term SLAM system for mobile robotic platforms

Projects

AI · NLP
RESCUE MATE

AI tools for emergency response — real-time social media analysis, ASR pipelines, and NLP for operational environments.

rescue-mate.de ↗
NLU · Dialogue
SPEAKER

Graph-based dialogue system for task-oriented human–machine interaction with NLU components for intent and entity recognition.

speaker.fraunhofer.de ↗
Visualisation
RESCUE-MATE Crisis Map

Interactive map visualisation of crisis-related event data enriched with knowledge graph information.

Demo (not always running) ↗
